div.p: The high-value use of GRP's imagination engine Imagine the end state. Reverse-engineer the actions that produce it.
TASK INTENT e.g. "Make this page look like the Figma mock" e.g. "Pick up the cup and pour it"
ACT Run the derived action sequence
OBSERVED RESULT New screenshot · scene · video
RECONCILE (collaborative) Compare imagined vs observed Both sides update — neither is the adversary Surprise = information, not failure
LEARN Write to MWM if prediction error > threshold (causal edges, site patterns, motor calibrations)

The Inversion Standard pipeline: observe → reason step-by-step → act GRP end-state mode: imagine target → derive actions → execute Work shifts to where modern foundation models are strongest: imagining final states, not grounding intermediate steps.
IMAGINED END STATE Final screenshot or Full video of action sequence Quality of output ∝ quality of imagination
WEB DESIGN PATH Diff target screenshot vs current → generate HTML/CSS/JS that closes the diff
MOTOR / ROBOTICS PATH Inverse-dynamics from imagined video → motor commands whose execution reproduces the imagined frames
